rules.headings: Bold/Black weight, tracking-tight or tracking-tighter. Never center unless context demands (e.g., empty state). No generic sans-serifs.
rules.body: Regular weight, leading-relaxed for long text, tracking-normal.

typography.import_instructions: Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' from Fontshare CDN (https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,500,700,400,900&display=swap) and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Swiss Grid with Technical precision
spacing_and_layout.padding: p-6 to p-12 for major containers. Avoid cramped content.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Strict grid hierarchy. Dashboard uses Control Room layout (grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12), tight gap-4 or gap-6 for data widgets, but wide outer margins.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid #0A0A0A on all cards, inputs, and containers to create a 'Grid Borders / Technical / Brutalist' look.

components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid black border, sharp corners. On hover for interactive cards: -translate-y-1, solid black shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]).
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#002FA7] text-white. Secondary buttons: bg-white text-black border border-black. Sharp corners, bold text. Hover: Solid offset shadow.
components.inputs: Shadcn components (Form, Input, Select, Calendar, Dialog). Heavily customized with 1px solid black border, rounded-none. Focus: ring-2 ring-[#002FA7] ring-offset-0.
components.navigation: Sidebar or Topbar with solid white background, distinct 1px black border separating from main content.
components.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts) with crisp lines, strictly 2D (no gradients or 3D effects). Use primary (#002FA7) and secondary (#FFCC00) colors.

image_urls.description: User profile avatar for dashboard header/settings
Abstract minimal geometric background for the login/auth split layout

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards. High contrast Black-on-White or White-on-Blue combinations.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive elements and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='post-composer-textarea', data-testid='connect-twitter-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a Mixpost clone (SaaS app) with a Portuguese (Brazilian) interface.
Do NOT use gradients, purple, violet, or teal.
Adhere to the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) design rules.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts and Shadcn for complex interactives (Forms, Select, Dialogs, Tabs, Charts).
Implement a Neo-Brutalist/Swiss style: 1px solid borders, sharp corners, solid offset shadows on hover for interactive elements.
Ensure the dashboard feels like a 'Control Room' - utilize screen real estate efficiently but maintain clear visual separation through solid borders.
Mock the social media connections (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn) as requested.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use Shadcn's specific calendar for the date picker (schedule posts) rather than HTML input type='date'.
